title: MapReduce Job Output Management
description: The 'lib/output' directory manages MapReduce job outputs. It includes classes for task and job manifest management, ensuring accurate tracking of task outputs. The Hadoop Manifest Committer Implementation ensures data integrity by creating and managing manifest files. This directory collaborates with other components for efficient job commit and recovery, maintaining data integrity and ensuring accurate tracking of outputs. It plays a crucial role in the architectural pattern of data integrity and job management in Hadoop MapReduce.
